requirements for motor carriers providing services at port facilities that are reasonably related to the reduction of environmental pollution.
Document 2: Short Sea Shipping Act of 2009 - exempts commercial cargo from the harbor maintenance tax.
Defines the 'Great Lakes Saint Lawrence Seaway System' as the waterway between Duluth, Minnesota, and Nova Scotia.
Document 3: Amends the Internal Revenue Code to exempt from the harbor maintenance tax commercial cargo loaded at a port in the U.S. mainland.
Defines the 'Great Lakes Saint Lawrence Seaway System' as the waterway between Duluth, Minnesota, and Sept Iles, Quebec.

topic.name: Regional Economic Development
topic.description: Legislation focused on establishing authorities and commissions to promote economic development in specific U.S. border and regional areas.

Document 1: Establishes the Southwest Regional Border Authority.
Requires the Authority to develop plans and programs for the economic development of the Southwest border region.
Document 2: Establishes the Northern Border Economic Development Commission.
Requires each such state to submit a development plan for the area of the region represented by such state.
Document 3: Directs the Secretary of Veterans Affairs and the Appalachian Regional Commission to carry out a program of outreach to veterans.
Authorizes the Commission to provide technical assistance, award grants, enter into contracts, and otherwise provide amounts to persons and entities in that region for such projects and activities.

topic.name: Health and Safety Regulations
topic.description: This topic encompasses legislation related to health standards and services in various sectors, including food safety and healthcare for veterans and individuals with disabilities.

Document 1: Amends the Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act limit the somatic cell count in all dairy products sold
Subjects any person that sells, transports, or offers for sale or transport in interstate commerce any dairy product in violation of this Act to a civil penalty.
Document 2: establish within the Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) an Office of Disability Coordination
require the Coordinator's position to be established as a Senior Executive Service position to be filled by a career appointee.
Document 3: require a program under which the Secretary of Veterans Affairs provides chiropractic care and services to veterans
to be carried out at no fewer than 75 medical centers by December 31, 2009.

topic.name: Energy Policy and Regulation
topic.description: This topic encompasses legislation related to the development, regulation, and deployment of energy technologies and resources.

Document 1: Directs the Secretary of Energy to develop and publish near-, medium-, and long-term goals for the deployment of clean energy technologies.
Requires annual reports to Congress on the technologies supported and on Corporation performance.
Document 2: Amends the Federal Power Act to direct the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission to give equal consideration to private landownership.
Requires a hydropower project licensee to consider private landownership as a means to encourage private investment.

topic.name: Legislative Initiatives for Community Improvement
topic.description: This cluster of documents discusses various legislative acts aimed at improving community welfare through environmental protection, educational resources, and offender reentry programs.

Document 1: Great Lakes Assurance Program Verification Act of 2012 to prevent agricultural pollution in the Great Lakes basin.
Defines 'Great Lakes State' as Illinois, Indiana, Michigan, Minnesota, New York, Ohio, Pennsylvania, or Wisconsin.
Document 2: Amends the Museum and Library Services Act to expand grant purposes to include open educational reading material courses.
Authorizes grants to institutions of higher education for the creation of open educational reading materials.
Document 3: Amends the Omnibus Crime Control and Safe Streets Act to provide expanded services for offender reentry into society.
Directs the Attorney General to award grants for state and local reentry courts and drug treatment programs.

topic.name: Indian Reservation Legislation
topic.description: Legislation concerning land management and criminal justice on Indian reservations in the United States.

Document 1: Cross Border Reservation Drug Trafficking Sentence Enhancement Act of 2010
impose a fine and/or 10-year prison term on anyone who knowingly or intentionally traffics in a controlled substance within a federal or state Indian reservation
Document 2: transfer certain property within the exterior boundaries of the Standing Rock Indian Reservation
held in trust for the Standing Rock Sioux Tribe of North and South Dakota
Document 3: land exchange in Idaho between the Blaine County School District and the city of Ketchum
involving specified parcels in Blaine County
